title: Close stale PRs: #252, #251, #228
description:
Close 3 stale jeremyevans PRs that are 6+ years old and likely incompatible post-upgrade:

- **#252** "Support CONCEPTQL_NO_CONSTANT_ORDER_BY on PostgreSQL/Redshift" (2019)
- **#251** "Make episode operator interval work on redshift" (2019)
- **#228** "Support CONCEPTQL_AVOID_CTES=true" (2019)

Review each briefly to see if any ideas are still worth extracting, then close with a comment.
close_reason: Closed PRs #252, #251, #228 with comments explaining rationale.

title: Review and merge Dependabot PR #322 (webdrivers bump)
description:
Dependabot PR #322 bumps webdrivers from 5.2.0 to 5.3.1. Opened 2026-02-22.

- Review the changelog/diff
- Ensure CI passes
- Merge if clean
close_reason: Closed PR #322 — webdrivers 5.3.1 restricts Selenium to 4.0-4.10, but conceptql uses Selenium 4.41.0. The webdrivers gem is deprecated in favor of Selenium Manager (built into Selenium 4.11+). Bumping would break things. PR closed with comment explaining rationale.

title: Triage and resolve 16 Dependabot security alerts
description:
conceptql has 16 open Dependabot security alerts:

- **Nokogiri** — multiple libxml2/libxslt CVEs
- **REXML** — 6 DoS alerts on malformed XML
- **Active Support** — information disclosure
- **SafeBuffer** — XSS vulnerability
- **Rake** — OS command injection (2 alerts)

Triage each alert:
1. Update gems where possible to resolve
2. Dismiss alerts that don't apply (e.g. if the vulnerable code path isn't reachable)
3. Document any that require upstream fixes
close_reason: All 16 security alerts already resolved by the Ruby 4.0 / Rails 8.1 upgrade. Current versions: nokogiri 1.19.1, rexml 3.4.4, activesupport 8.1.2, rake 13.3.1 — all exceed the patched versions. GitHub confirms all 16 alerts in 'fixed' state.

title: Delete stale branches
description:
Clean up leftover branches that are no longer needed post-upgrade:

- `ruby-3.3-upgrade`, `ignitor` — old branches
- `issue-293` through `issue-297` — old feature branches
- `ghfixes_20250514` — old fixes branch

Review each branch to confirm nothing valuable, then delete from remote.

title: Remove webdrivers gem dependency
description: webdrivers (~> 5.2) is a dev dependency in conceptql.gemspec but is no longer needed. Selenium 4.11+ includes Selenium Manager which handles driver downloads natively. Current Selenium version is 4.41.0. Remove the webdrivers dependency from conceptql.gemspec and update Gemfile.lock.
